Type & Mark

Anton Display
Archivo — subheads & specs

Logo: Concept 2 — the Sundown Spotlight (coral sun-disc, palm silhouette, teal reflection slices). Locked on every graphic with the wordmark. Signature device: the mirrored "waterline" reflection.

The engine.

Four pillars, three monthly arcs, one funnel. Every post carries the mark, the name, and a nudge to Quick Quote.

Four Pillars

Education · 27

Fleet & Playbooks

Know-Your-Stage specs, the stage-size chooser, permits, hurricane & festival playbooks.

History · 23

50 Years

Archive & then-and-now, event legacy, milestones — building to the anniversary.

Meet the Team · 18

Backstage

Crew spotlights, the build, the yard, logistics, hiring — the hands behind the headliners.

Sales · 22

Now Booking

Quote CTAs, booking windows, the APEX 4232 launch, VIP-deck upsell.

Three Monthly Arcs

M1 · Jul 15 – Aug 18

Fleet Authority + Hurricane Readiness

Flagship deep-dives (5040, 4240), the stage-size chooser, the permits guide, in-season contingency.

M2 · Aug 19 – Sep 15

Booking-Season Push

NYE/holiday booking opens, fall festival prep, 3224 + compact class, the 4232 teaser begins.

M3 · Sep 16 – Oct 12

Anniversary Peak + 4232 Launch

The 50th-anniversary payoff, Hialeah & Big Orange case studies, the APEX 4232 reveal, rebrand moment.

The 90-day calendar.

Every post and reel, click any to enlarge and read the caption. Filter by pillar, type, or week.

The files.

Delivered as three monthly zips (M1 / M2 / M3), organized and export-clean at native Instagram resolution.

SetSizeCountUse
Feed — portrait1080×135090Daily in-feed post (4:5)
Feed — story crop1080×192090Share each feed post to Stories (9:16)
Reels / Stories1080×192065Reel covers & story cards (9:16)
Total245JPEG q88, sRGB

Naming: wWW-dD.jpg (feed portrait), wWW-dD-st.jpg (story crop), wWW-rN.jpg (reels). WW = week, D = weekday, N = reel #. A content-calendar.csv with every caption, pillar, date, and filename is included for scheduling.
